mission.title: pushgateway: Don't accept timestamps from pushes
mission.description: Don't accept timestamps from pushes. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current pushgateway deployment
steps.description:
Verify your pushgateway version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n pushgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/name=pushgateway
helm list -n pushgateway 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working pushgateway installation.

steps.title: Review pushgateway configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant pushgateway configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n pushgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/name=pushgateway
kubectl get configmap -n pushgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=pushgateway
```
My ruminations on https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ordTPfUSaGvaBolUGeLChATwgc1xUhUxfUhudYoOeMw/edit indicate that my original plan of having the pushgateway ultimately expose data with the timestamp it was pushed at is unworkable.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Don't accept timestamps from pushes
steps.description:
I once thought that some day we'd solve staleness, and there
would be valid use cases for the pushgateway to expose timestamps.
With the recent work on staleness this has turned out not to be the case.
As every single person we have seen pushing timestamps to the pgw
has been doing so incorrectly (usually misguidedly trying to make
Prometheus do push), let's send a stronger signal that this is not the
right way to do things.

With this in place I think we'll have all the mitigation we're going

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n pushgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/name=pushgateway
kubectl get events -n pushgateway --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Don't accept timestamps from pushes" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
I once thought that some day we'd solve staleness, and there
would be valid use cases for the pushgateway to expose timestamps.
With the recent work on staleness this has turned out not to be the case.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with pushgateway installed or the issue environment reproducible.
